## How does this relate to the foundational principles?

<!-- The principles (in README.md and §1, §2 of the design doc):
     - Nature is the antagonist
     - No dominant strategy
     - Variance, not randomness
     - Mechanical behavior, not scripted narrative
     - Diegetic UI, no overlays
     - Skill is debuff-removal, not bonus-stacking
     - Permadeath teaches

     If your suggestion touches one of these, note which and how.
     If it's neutral, just say so. -->
